characters.name: Beatrice
characters.description:
BeatriceCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanEthnicityWhiteRaceCaucasianGenderFemaleAge9OrientationHeterosexualPronounsShe/HerAppearanceOutfitWhite shirtOlive skirtWhite socksLight gray-ish shoesGreen rubber boots ("The Boot" only)TraitsHandednessAmbidextrousComplexionWhiteHeight4’6”Weight87½ lbsHairBrownEyesBrownProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Elementary School StudentLike(s)PonyAnimalsMonster TrucksThe Ferris WheelPineapple on Her PizzaReadingCamping Out With Her FriendsDislike(s)Losing pets... and mostly PonyBeing IgnoredPersonal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Unnamed motherFive unknown goldfishFriend(s)PonyAnnie BramleyGerry(accidental love interest in "Space Shippers" only)HestonClara BornsteinHenriettaBrian MulrooneyPollyFredAlly(s)Helen BramleyGeorge BramleyGordon GravlaxMediaFirst Appearance"Plants!" (cameo)Last Appearance"Annie the Influencer"Voice Actor(s)Megan Hilty Beatriceis a supporting character ofIt's Pony. She is a friend ofAnnie Bramleyand mostlyPony. Beatrice is normally a cheerful and cute young child who adores all kinds of animals, as much as Annie, but her favorite animal is always Pony.
She can easily remorse her bad actions, like when she tries to make Pony hers, when he actually belongs to Annie.
She's also very smart and studious, as she carries a dozen books.

characters.name: Pony Bramley
characters.description: PonyPresentYoungFull NamePony Bramley[1]CharacteristicsSpeciesHorseGenderMaleAge8PronounsHe/HisAppearanceOutfitWinter:Purple suitTeal hoof glovesDark indigo hoof bootsTraitsFurBrownHairYellowEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Annie's petLike(s)AnnieBeing with AnniePlants (currently)Playing the tubaDislike(s)Plants (formerly)Personal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Unnamed fatherUnnamed donkey motherAnnie(best friend)GeorgeHelenRuthFitzFriend(s)DaveAnnie Bramley (owner)Clara BornsteinHestonGerryBeatriceHenrietta(sometimes)Brian MulrooneyFredPollyAlly(s)Gordon GravlaxEnemy(s)DogGarbanzosBiker GangNoodleneck NedHalf-Pint HarryAlley CatsMaxKyleRoyMr. MülderMediaFirst Appearance"Plants!"Last Appearance"Special Sauce"Voice Actor(s)Josh Zuckerman Ponyis the titular deuteragonist ofIt's Pony. Pony isAnnie Bramley's pet horse, though he sometimes resists the label as "pet". Annie considers Pony her best friend. Pony is fun-loving and enjoys hanging out with Annie and creating mischief along the way. This has caused him and Annie to be banned from various locations. He developed a fear of plants for awhile in "Plants!".
